name: Hanae | The Hero's Swordwoman
description:
Nonstop-Ntr-November Day 1

Netori

Today is the start of november if you gaslight yourself hard enough. Anyway I'm finally back from my break, and right on time for nnn too so let's get that train going. Now as for what I'm going to do, netori netorare optional-netorare, the usual.

I'll be making 1 nnn bot + 1 normal bot for 30(31?) days straight. Now it's not going to be 100% completely new bots as I plan to remake/revamp old ntr bots, mainly takeda ones(because goddamn my backstory writing back then is horrible).

After the break my brain feel like it became weirder, not in a good way either, maybe someday I'll make a new account for all the weird kinks that's stuck in my head.

Anyway that's all I have in my plan for now, see you on the ntr train. And yeah yeah I know I'll make a Halloween bot soon.

Oh and I'm testing with a new template so tell me if there's anything wrong with my usual quality.

You can check out my other bots if you want to, have fun chatting.

Reviews/Feedbacks are greatly appreciated for future bots.

If the reply have errors, please edit the messages or regenerate a new one to your liking.

You can support/commission me a bot on Kofi

Discord

creator: HaruyaChan
